_comment: Reverse-chronological updates. Edit freely; the homepage shows the most recent few with a Show All toggle. Verify the month on non-TRI items if you want them exact.

news.html: Started a research internship at Toyota Research Institute (Cambridge, MA), working with Mark Zolotas.
Fast Digitization in XR of Reality-Linked Gaussian-Splatted Proxies received a Best Research Demo Honorable Mention at IEEE VR 2026.
Presented two first-author works at IEEE VR 2026: a research demo on Gaussian-splatted proxies and a poster on bimanual teleoperation.
SwEYEpinch and Beyond was accepted to ACM CHI 2026.
Presented VR Task Guidance Through Relative 6DoF Pose Specification at IEEE ISMAR 2025 in Daejeon, South Korea.
